\boxed{C}

The **Bulldog** is widely considered one of the oldest dog breeds, with evidence of its existence dating back to ancient civilizations like the Greeks and Romans (before 400 BCE). While Pugs and Boxers also have ancient origins, Bulldogs are particularly noted for their long-standing history as a distinct breed. Chihuahuas, in contrast, are much newer, originating in Mexico only a few centuries ago.
